note: Provider submodule of fontyourface. Import needs a Google API key + network, so cases are recipe (response-graded).

evals.prompt: How do you enable Google Fonts import in Drupal's @font-your-face, and which config key stores the credential?
evals.expected_output: Enter a Google Fonts API key on the @font-your-face settings form (/admin/appearance/font/settings); it is stored in google_fonts_api.settings:google_api_key. The Import button stays disabled until a valid key is set.

evals.prompt: How does the google_fonts_api submodule load enabled Google fonts on a rendered page?
evals.expected_output: hook_page_attachments() aggregates all enabled Google fonts into a single https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=…&subset=…&display=swap request injected as a <link rel=stylesheet>.

evals.prompt: What is the fontyourface provider id (pid) for Google-fonts entities and how are they imported?
evals.expected_output: pid is google_fonts_api; hook_fontyourface_import() fetches the googleapis webfonts catalog and saves one font per family/variant/subset with fontyourface_save_font().
